title: Argentinian Empanadas with Taleggio Cheese Filling
description: A classic Argentinian dish featuring flaky empanada pastry filled with a creamy taleggio cheese mixture, perfect for a dinner or snack.
instructions: Roll out the empanada pastry and cut out circles of dough.
Combine the softened taleggio cheese, olive oil, and argentinian seasoning in a bowl.
Spoon a small amount of the cheese mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling, forming a half-circle shape, and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little water and sprinkle with salt.
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
